description: Northeast Community Bancorp, Inc. operates as the holding company for NorthEast Community Bank that provides financial services for individuals and businesses. It accepts various deposit instruments, including checking accounts, money market accounts, regular savings accounts, and non-interest-bearing demand accounts, as well as certificates of deposits. The company also offers construction, commercial and industrial loans, multifamily and mixed-use real estate, non-residential real estate loans, and consumer loans.
